name: Pork Roast L'orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eight 1/2-inch slits in pork roast and insert garlic slivers.
2. In a large bowl, combine orange juice, apricots, cloves, and ginger.
3. Place pork roast in marinade. Refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Remove roast from marinade and place in Dutch oven or heavy saucepan. Reserve marinade.
5. Brown meat over high heat in oil. Season with salt and pepper, pour reserved marinade over roast.
6. Roast in oven for 2-3 hours or until meat thermometer inserted in thickest part registers 170°F (75°C). Baste occasionally.
7. During last 10 minutes of cooking, brush apple halves with sauce and cook in roasting pan.
8. Garnish platter with glazed apple halves and mandarin orange segments.
